en: Paul and Timothy, servants of Christ Jesus, To all the saints in Christ Jesus who are at Philippi, with the overseers and deacons:
zh: 基督耶穌的僕人保羅和提摩太，寫信給所有住在腓立比，在基督耶穌裡的聖徒、監督和執事。

en: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
zh: 願恩惠平安從我們的父 神和主耶穌基督臨到你們。

en: I thank my God in all my remembrance of you,
zh: 我每逢想到你們，就感謝我的 神；

en: always in every prayer of mine for you all making my prayer with joy,
zh: 每次為你們大家祈求的時候，總是歡歡喜喜地祈求。

en: because of your partnership in the gospel from the first day until now.
zh: 為了你們從頭一天直到現在都在福音的事工上有分，我就感謝我的 神。

en: And I am sure of this, that he who began a good work in you will bring it to completion at the day of Jesus Christ.
zh: 我深信那在你們中間開始了美好工作的，到了基督耶穌的日子，必成全這工作。

en: It is right for me to feel this way about you all, because I hold you in my heart, for you are all partakers with me of grace, both in my imprisonment and in the defense and confirmation of the gospel.
zh: 為你們眾人我有這樣的思想是很恰當的，因為你們常常在我的心裡，無論我是在捆鎖之中，或是在辯護和證實福音的時候，你們都和我一同分享 神的恩典。

en: For God is my witness, how I yearn for you all with the affection of Christ Jesus.
zh: 我是怎樣以基督耶穌的心腸，切切地想念你們眾人，這是 神可以為我作證的。

en: And it is my prayer that your love may abound more and more, with knowledge and all discernment,
zh: 我所禱告的，是要你們的愛心，在充足的知識和各樣的見識上，多而又多，

en: so that you may approve what is excellent, and so be pure and blameless for the day of Christ,
zh: 使你們可以辨別是非，成為真誠無可指摘的人，直到基督的日子，

en: filled with the fruit of righteousness that comes through Jesus Christ, to the glory and praise of God.
zh: 靠著耶穌基督結滿了公義的果子，使 神得著榮耀和讚美。

en: I want you to know, brothers, that what has happened to me has really served to advance the gospel,
zh: 弟兄們，我願意你們知道，我所遭遇的反而使福音更加興旺了，

en: so that it has become known throughout the whole imperial guard and to all the rest that my imprisonment is for Christ.
zh: 以致整個宮裡的衛隊和其餘一切的人，都知道我是為了基督才受捆鎖的；

en: And most of the brothers, having become confident in the Lord by my imprisonment, are much more bold to speak the word without fear.
zh: 而且大多數主內的弟兄，因我所受的捆鎖，就篤信不疑，毫無畏懼，更勇敢地傳講 神的道。

en: Some indeed preach Christ from envy and rivalry, but others from good will.
zh: 有些人傳揚基督是出於嫉妒和紛爭，但也有些人是出於好意。

en: The latter do it out of love, knowing that I am put here for the defense of the gospel.
zh: 這些人是出於愛心，知道我是派來為福音辯護的。

en: The former proclaim Christ out of rivalry, not sincerely but thinking to afflict me in my imprisonment.
zh: 那些人傳講基督卻是出於自私，動機並不純正，只想加重我在捆鎖中的煩惱。

en: What then? Only that in every way, whether in pretense or in truth, Christ is proclaimed, and in that I rejoice. Yes, and I will rejoice,
zh: 那有甚麼關係呢？真心也好，假意也好，無論怎麼樣，基督總被傳開了，為此我就歡喜；並且我還要歡喜，

en: for I know that through your prayers and the help of the Spirit of Jesus Christ this will turn out for my deliverance,
zh: 因為我知道，藉著你們的祈求和耶穌基督的靈的幫助，我一定會得到釋放。

en: as it is my eager expectation and hope that I will not be at all ashamed, but that with full courage now as always Christ will be honored in my body, whether by life or by death.
zh: 我所熱切期待和盼望的，就是在凡事上我都不會羞愧，只要滿有膽量，不論生死，總要讓基督在我身上照常被尊為大。

en: For to me to live is Christ, and to die is gain.
zh: 因為我活著就是基督，我死了就有益處。

en: If I am to live in the flesh, that means fruitful labor for me. Yet which I shall choose I cannot tell.
zh: 但如果我仍在世上活著，能夠使我的工作有成果，我就不知道應該怎樣選擇了！

en: I am hard pressed between the two. My desire is to depart and be with Christ, for that is far better.
zh: 我處於兩難之間，情願離世與基督同在，因為那是好得無比的。

en: But to remain in the flesh is more necessary on your account.
zh: 可是為了你們，我更需要活在世上。

en: Convinced of this, I know that I will remain and continue with you all, for your progress and joy in the faith,
zh: 我既然這樣深信，就知道還要活下去，並且要繼續和你們大家在一起，使你們在信心上有長進，有喜樂，

en: so that in me you may have ample cause to glory in Christ Jesus, because of my coming to you again.
zh: 以致你們因為我要再到你們那裡去，就在基督耶穌裡更加以我為榮。

en: Only let your manner of life be worthy of the gospel of Christ, so that whether I come and see you or am absent, I may hear of you that you are standing firm in one spirit, with one mind striving side by side for the faith of the gospel,
zh: 不過，你們行事為人 應當和基督的福音相配。這樣，無論我來見你們或是不在你們中間，都可以聽到你們的情況，就是你們有同一的心志，站立得穩，為了福音的信仰齊心努力，

en: and not frightened in anything by your opponents. This is a clear sign to them of their destruction, but of your salvation, and that from God.
zh: 甚麼事都不怕有反對你們的人，這就證明他們要滅亡，你們要得救，這都是出於 神。

en: For it has been granted to you that for the sake of Christ you should not only believe in him but also suffer for his sake,
zh: 因為 神為了基督的緣故賜恩給你們，使你們不單是信基督，也是要為他受苦；

en: engaged in the same conflict that you saw I had and now hear that I still have.
zh: 你們面對的爭戰，和你們在我身上所見過，現在又聽到的是一樣的。
